content.en:
The Lord of the Yuan Gu waited for the Supreme to discuss it, and then began to officially execute their plan.

At the same time, they also informed those sons of the era, Supreme Highnesses, about some of these plans, and asked them to collect ordinary Arcana-level Innate Arcana!

The quest plan to collect the Innate Arcana has begun!

At the beginning, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others were very low-key, looking for some ordinary cosmic races and some advanced races, and buying the innate treasures possessed by those races at a higher price.

For those races, there is no difference between the innate treasure and the acquired treasure, they are both treasures!

Even in this era of the universe, there is no subdivision between the innate and acquired treasures, and they are all divided into three levels: ordinary treasures, top-level treasures, and strong treasures.

Therefore, in their eyes, the treasures are all weapons, and the effects are almost the same.

Therefore, the Lord of the Yuan Gu is willing to exchange a higher price for the Innate Treasure, and they are naturally willing, because this is a matter of taking advantage.

Moreover, the Lord of the Yuan Gu is also willing to add some additional resources, and it is even more popular with some races.

Over time, the Lord of the Yuan Gu collected some Innate Arcana.

It's a pity that the innate treasures of the entire universe are very limited, and the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others must put away the innate treasures of this universe era, and the innate treasures of other universe epochs are useless, and there is no doubt about the acquired treasures.

Three hundred years later, on this day.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supreme beings opened the meeting again to discuss.

"No, this speed is too slow, we are looking for some ordinary cosmic races and advanced races, there are too few of those races who have innate treasures, and some of the rumors of innate treasures are even false. The true innate supreme treasures of this universe are basically kept in the hands of the powerful cosmic clans, as well as the gods and demons, as well as some scattered cultivation supremes, it's time to trade with some powerful cosmic clans!"

The Lord of the Progengus proposed.

"In this case, the Protoss and the Demon Race will also know, and they will definitely be suspicious. "

One of the Supremes asked.

"Doubt is doubt, as long as they are willing to trade, it is not a problem, there is a good thing, even if the gods and demons are not willing to trade, the other universe clans will be willing to trade. As long as they are willing to trade the Innate Treasure, they can pay more price!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"Okay, then let's each be responsible for trading with a cosmic clan!"

Jin Guang Tianzun said.

"Yes!"

The Supremes nodded in response.

......

In the territory of the Terrans, there is a huge city located on the edge of the Terrans, called the Capital of the Heavenly Domain.

The capital of the Heavenly Domain is a very prosperous place, and this place is one of the few places where the human race can allow foreign races to enter.

Here, there are many alien races, and there are even alien races that have a bad relationship with the human race.

Although the Heavenly Capital was built by the Terrans, it had its own rules, and once anyone entered the Heavenly Capital, they could not fight each other.

It can even be said that the high-level of the human race must not violate the rules of the Heavenly Capital.

It is precisely because of this that the alien race dares to step into the capital of the heavenly region and make the capital of the heavenly region prosperous.

The reason why the Terrans established the Heavenly Capital was also to be able to trade with other races, after all, the resources of each race are not complete, and some resources are not available to the Terrans, and they need to be obtained from other races.

There are many chamber of commerce companies of other races in the Heavenly Capital, so that the strong people of the Terran can buy the resources of other races from there, and the aliens can also obtain the resources and treasures of the Terran in the Capital of the Heavenly Domain.

In short, the Celestial Capital is a small place for all races to trade.

Not only the Terrans have such places, but other races basically have such places.

this day.

A masked Supreme arrives in the Celestial Capital, and his arrival quickly causes a riot.

Just because as soon as he entered the Heavenly Domain, he entered the trading place with the highest rules, and took out a top-level treasure, and it was the highest treasure among the top-level treasures, second only to the strongest treasure.

When this Supreme said that he could only exchange for a top-level top-level Arcana Treasure, even a weaker top-level Arcana could be exchanged for this top-level Arcana, he instantly shocked the Heavenly Domain.

Then, the upper echelons of the Terran also knew.

It's just that this supreme hides his identity, and he only senses a trace of supreme breath, and he can't know his identity.

But the status of a supreme is so high, naturally no one dares to fight the idea of a supreme.

If it was just a top-level treasure, it wouldn't shock the human race, but this supreme took out several top-level treasures, and the exchange requirements were the same, which was simply a loss-making transaction.

Therefore, the Terran top brass had to pay attention.

Holy City.

Five or six Supreme Temporary Advent Clones came here to discuss it, and the Kunwu Supreme was not present, but the Absolute Spell Supreme came.

"Everyone, what happened in the capital of the Heavenly Domain, everyone should have understood, that Supreme doesn't know which clan it is, and he actually exchanged the highest top Supreme Treasure for the Innate Supreme Treasure of the top Supreme Treasure level, regardless of quality, this is a loss-making transaction!

"Could it be a trap?"

"It won't be a trap, the capital of the Heavenly Domain is also the territory of our human race, there are really alien supremes who dare to make trouble, and they will definitely not be able to escape!"

"If it's not a trap, how could anyone make such a strange deal?"

"Anyway, let's take a look first, Divine Blade Supreme, you go and take a look, after all, your Divine Blade Alliance is also good at business, if it's okay, you can trade it!"

......

The Divine Blade Supreme pondered for a moment and said, "Okay, I'll take a look, if there is a problem, you can take action at any time!"

"No problem!"

Other supreme answers.

Wow!

The incarnation of the Divine Blade Supreme dissipated.

Soon after, the incarnation of the Divine Blade Supreme came to the Heavenly Capital.

Without understanding the situation, the Divine Blade Supreme will naturally not descend from the body, and the incarnation is enough to solve the problem.

The moment he entered the Heavenly Domain, the Divine Blade Supreme sensed the existence of that Supreme.

"It's ......"

The Divine Blade Supreme was shocked.

Although the other party hid his aura, the aura on his body was far beyond his imagination, and it was definitely not an ordinary supreme, even more powerful than the mixed yuan supreme!

"Could it be that he is a member of the Protoss and the Demon Race, no, the breath is not the supreme ...... of the Protoss and the Demon Race"

In an instant, the Divine Blade Supreme understood.

This is a certain supreme of the Twelve Universe Eras!

"I wonder which Supreme of the Twelve Universe Epochs Your Excellency is?"

The Divine Blade Supreme asked through the air.

"Second Cosmic Era, Heavenly Grace Supreme!"

The Heavenly Grace Supreme appeared in front of the Divine Blade Supreme and said.

"It turned out to be the Heavenly Grace Supreme, I don't know what the Heavenly Grace Supreme came to the Heavenly Domain Capital of the Human Race?"

The Divine Blade Supreme asked with some vigilance.

The Heavenly Grace Supreme took out his top treasure and said, "Make a deal!"
